backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for a student bank app, including CRUD operations for students, accounts, transactions, and bank details, plus user profile management and role-based access control via admin/user authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the admin login flow fix in App.tsx to its relevant components, test IDs, and files for build/audit tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing each page/component's purpose and notable changes in the current version.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind layers and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and UI surface variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component managing Internet Identity authentication, pending login state, admin/user role detection, error display in Marathi, and client-side page routing to the dashboard or login screen.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider wrapping the DFINITY AuthClient to expose Internet Identity login, logout, identity state, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including CRUD for students, accounts, transactions, bank details, and user profiles using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins and Noto Sans Devanagari fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds scrollbar and print styles.
frontend/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx: Responsive dashboard shell with a gradient sidebar navigation, mobile overlay toggle, role-based nav item visibility, and a top header with page title and logout button.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Account.tsx: Account management page with a searchable table and modal form for creating, editing, and deleting student bank accounts, auto-populating class from the selected student.
frontend/src/pages/BankDetails.tsx: Bank details management page with search, and admin-gated add/edit/delete modal for storing bank name, taluka, district, and IFSC code records.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Transaction history page that searches transactions by account number and optional date range, displays deposit/withdrawal summaries, and supports CSV download and print.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Dashboard home page that displays summary cards for total students, accounts, deposits, withdrawals, balance, and bank details fetched via React Query hooks. Shows a loading spinner while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with admin and user tabs that authenticates via Internet Identity, collecting username/password for admin or account number for users, then triggers the appropriate login flow in App.tsx.
frontend/src/pages/PassbookPrint.tsx: Passbook page that lets admins select an account to view its transaction history in a printable format, or shows a logged-in user's own passbook directly.
frontend/src/pages/Student.tsx: Student management page with a searchable list and CRUD operations (add, edit, delete) for student records, using a modal form and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/Transaction.tsx: Transaction management page supporting deposit and withdrawal entries with account selection, balance calculation, and full CRUD operations via a modal form.
frontend/src/utils/localStorage.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and CRUD utility functions for managing student, account, transaction, and bank detail records in localStorage using safe get/set wrappers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Poppins, Noto Sans Devanagari), CSS variable-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and typography/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording an existing frontend admin login flow fix and a pending backend fix (AR-1) to correctly assign the admin role during `adminLogin` without errors.
